x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on work order tables can conflict with Now Assist FSM AI Agent scheduling actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules on wm_order and wm_task. Test Now Assist FSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs before Now Assist go-live.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Custom business rules on work order tables can conflict with Now Assist FSM AI Agent scheduling actions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>FSM Customization Risk</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    ga.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'wm_order,wm_task');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom Business Rules on FSM tables (wm_order, wm_task)';

    if (count <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low FSM customization risk (' + count + ' custom BRs). Now Assist FSM AI dispatch and scheduling actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom BRs on FSM tables. Moderate customization risk — test Now Assist FSM in sub-production before enabling in production.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High FSM customization risk: ' + count + ' custom BRs on core FSM tables. Extensive customization increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist FSM AI dispatch and scheduling actions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>FIELD_SERVICE</module>
<number>CHK0006067</number>
<order>150</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review custom Business Rules on wm_order and wm_task. Test Now Assist FSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs before Now Assist go-live.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb2</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
